question.text: Upon death of the Karta of a HUF, who can the surviving members appoint as the new Karta?

answer.text: The eldest surviving member of the HUF
Any member chosen by majority vote
Only a male member of the HUF

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Upon death of the Karta, the surviving members may appoint the eldest surviving member of the HUF as the new Karta. **The Trap:** 'Only a male member' reflects an outdated understanding — the eldest surviving member, regardless of gender, can be appointed. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series V-A covers HUF transmission for mutual fund investments. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The new Karta takes over the operation of the HUF demat account. For change of Karta name, the surviving members must submit signed letters and supporting documents to the DP.
